items.name: Google-Chrome-Cache-Cleaners
items.description: A collection of lightweight, easy-to-use tools to completely clear your Google Chrome cache. Over time, browser caches can build up, consuming gigabytes of storage and sometimes causing websites to act strangely. These scripts securely force-close Chrome and safely purge those hidden files.
